frozen_ocean.title: Travel to a Frozen Ocean or Deep Frozen Ocean biome

aquamirae_prep.title: Read the lore: Aquamirae creatures spawn in Frozen and Deep Cold Ocean biomes

subtitle.text: Aquamirae does not hunt you. It waits where the cold keeps everything still.

description: Aquamirae adds two major bosses to cold ocean biomes.
Captain Cornelia and the Mother of the Maze.
They require the Drowned World scroll to be researched
before they can be damaged — the boss lock system gates them.
Blue Ice marks frozen ocean depth.
It is also one of the fastest surface travel options in the game.
A blue ice road with Iceboat or just a boat
is faster than any horse before elytra.
The Frozen Chest entity (Aquamirae) spawns in frozen ocean floors.
It is not a block. It is a creature disguised as loot.
→ Travel to a Frozen or Deep Frozen Ocean [check]
